headline: Is Vistra (VST) Pricing Reflect Its Multi Year Surge And Conflicting Valuation Signals
summary: If you are wondering whether Vistra's current share price really reflects its value, you are not alone. This article is built to help you frame that question clearly. Vistra recently closed at US$153.96, with returns of 1.6% over 7 days, a 7.2% decline over 30 days, a 6.8% decline year to date, a 21.7% gain over the last year, and a very large multi year return over 3 and 5 years. These moves sit against a backdrop where investors are still assessing Vistra's role as a US utilities name...

headline: A Look At Vistra’s (VST) Valuation After Fitch Grants Investment Grade Rating
summary: What Fitch’s Investment-Grade Rating Could Mean for Vistra (VST) Investors Fitch’s decision to award Vistra (VST) an investment-grade credit rating, alongside its existing S&P rating, places the company in a stronger credit category that many institutional investors watch closely. This dual investment-grade status points to improved creditworthiness and more flexibility in how Vistra manages debt, funds projects, and returns capital. These factors can influence how you think about the stock’s...
